lines.english: He rids himself of egotism, Maya and doubt.
One who becomes Gurmukh understands.
The Gurmukh practices true self-control, and acts in excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪਉੜੀ ਊਤਮ ਊਚੀ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur kee paurree aootam aoochee dar sachai har gun gaaeidaa |7|
lines.english: He ascends the sublime, exalted ladder of the Guru, and he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord at His True Door. ||7||
The Gurmukh obtains the gate of salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: bhaae bhagat sadaa rang raataa aap gavaae samaaeidaa |8|
lines.english: Through loving devotion, he remains forever imbued with the Lord's Love; eradicating self-conceit, he merges in the Lord. ||8||
One who becomes Gurmukh examines his own mind, and instructs others.
He is lovingly attuned to the True Name forever.
As it pleases His Will, He unites us with the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਸੀ ਜੋ ਸਚੇ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai soee karasee jo sache man bhaaeidaa |9|
lines.english: They act in harmony with the Mind of the True Lord. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਭਾਣੈ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: aapanai bhaanai sadaa rang raataa bhaanai man vasaaeidaa |10|
lines.english: As it pleases His Will, He imbues us with His Love; as it pleases His Will, He comes to dwell in the mind. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tis bhaavai taa man vasaae |
lines.english: As it pleases His Will, He comes to dwell within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਰਾਤੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਦੁਖੇ ਦੁਖਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa raate dukh kamaaveh dukhe dukh samaaeidaa |11|
lines.english: Tinged by corruption, they earn only pain; they are immersed in pain. ||11||
Wearing all sorts of religious robes, they do not please the Lord.
Those who act stubborn-mindedly are destroyed.
One who becomes Gurmukh earns peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਜੋ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਸੋ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: maran jeevan jo sam kar jaanai so mere prabh bhaaeidaa |12|
lines.english: One who looks alike upon death and birth, is pleasing to my God. ||12||
He comes to understand death and birth.
He realizes that coming and going are according to God's Will.
The Gurmukh, while remaining dead, is respected and approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜੰਮੈ ਨਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: marai na jamai naa dukh paae man hee maneh samaaeidaa |13|
lines.english: He does not die, he is not reborn, and he does not suffer in pain; his mind merges in the Mind of God. ||13||
Very fortunate are those who find the True Guru.
He Himself acts, and inspires all to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: man niramal fir mail na laagai dar sachai sobhaa paaeidaa |14|
lines.english: Their minds are immaculate, and they are never again stained with filth. They are honored at the Door of the True Court. ||14||
They eradicate egotism and attachment from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਲੇਖੈ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh sevaa mere prabh bhaavai sach sun lekhai paaeidaa |15|
lines.english: The service of the Gurmukh is pleasing to my God; one who listens to the Truth is approved. ||15||
He Himself watches over all; He establishes and disestablishes.
The Gurmukh practices Truth, and only Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੧॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate veechaaree naame naam samaaeidaa |16|1|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who contemplate the Naam are imbued with it. They merge in the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||16||1||15||
The Gurmukh is immaculate; no filth attaches to him.
He Himself fashioned the Universe, through the Hukam of His Command.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:
He Himself establishes and disestablishes, and embellishes with grace.
The body takes the form of a fortress.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨਿਆਉ ਕਰੇ ਸਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਚਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape niaau kare sabh saachaa saache saach milaaeidaa |1|
lines.english: The True Lord Himself administers all justice; through Truth, we merge in the True Lord. ||1||
The body is the infinite fortress of gold;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਭਸਮੈ ਕੀ ਢੇਰੀ ਖੇਹੂ ਖੇਹ ਰਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai bhasamai kee dteree khehoo kheh ralaaeidaa |2|
lines.english: Without the Word of the Shabad, the body is reduced to a pile of ashes; in the end, dust mingles with dust. ||2||
Emotional attachment to Maya has expanded throughout its expanse.
it is permeated by the Infinite Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਚੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh gaavai sadaa gun saache mil preetam sukh paaeidaa |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukh sings the Glorious Praises of the True Lord forever; meeting his Beloved, he finds peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਵਸੈ ਮੁਰਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich har jeeo vasai muraare |
lines.english: The Dear Lord dwells within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਣਜਨਿ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਨਦਰੀ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad vanajan vaapaaree nadaree aap milaaeidaa |4|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the merchants trade, and in His Grace, the Lord merges them with Himself. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa har mandar har aap savaare |
lines.english: The body is the temple of the Lord; the Lord Himself embellishes it.
He alone is pure, who eradicates anger.
He realizes the Shabad, and reforms himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae karataa aape man vasaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: The Creator Himself acts, and inspires all to act; He Himself abides in the mind. ||5||
Pure and unique is devotional worship.
The mind and body are washed clean, contemplating the Shabad.
